title: Villazón Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Villazón, with a Z-Score of -3.40. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Villazón are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a heating degree day (HDD) value of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 34%, and the wind speed is moderate, at 11.8 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to have a substantial impact on various sectors, including agriculture, logistics, and energy.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme weather event.
